execution: Run npm install, npm run build, npm test, npm run lint, npm run format:check, and npm run lifecycle in this directory; lifecycle output records local_real_execution, blocked, or not_run per phase.

externalProviderEvidence.reason: The fixture has no external repository, provider credentials, identity, or enterprise control context.

boundary: Local executable fixture evidence is not proof of sandbox isolation, trusted identity, immutable audit, or compliance.
